title: New Horizons for Seniors Program - Community-based projects - Canada.ca
content:
## New Horizons for Seniors Program - Community-based projects
The New Horizons for Seniors Program (NHSP) community-based stream is a federal grant. It supports projects that are designed by seniors and for seniors in their communities. This program funds projects that empower seniors in their communities through increased social inclusion.

## Information sessions
Information sessions are delivered by ESDC to give an overview of:
- the application process
- technical support on how to use the online system
If you are interested, send an email to your nearest New Horizons for Seniors Program office .

## Help and contact information
- What are grants and contributions?
- If you have questions, need help or require an accommodation with this application process, contact your nearest New Horizons for Seniors Program office .
- Contact us here for technical help related to the Grants and Contribution Online Services (GCOS) by e-mail: NA-GCOS-SELSC-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
